title: Johnson & Johnson India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Johnson & Johnson India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Johnson & Johnson India has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Jaipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Johnson & Johnson India:
Johnson & Johnson India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Johnson & Johnson India!
